title: Misrepresentation of service animal
doc_html:
§1975. Misrepresentation of service animal

            No individual shall misrepresent an animal to be a service dog or service dog-in-training to a person or entity that owns or operates a public accommodation or a residential dwelling.

            Acts 2024, No. 558, §1.
doc_text:
§1975.  Misrepresentation of service animal
No individual shall misrepresent an animal to be a service dog or service dog-in-training to a person or entity that owns or operates a public accommodation or a residential
dwelling.
Acts 2024, No. 558, §1.
